rationale: The only resume change was the end date of a career gap (open-ended 'present' vs. a closed April–October 2025 window), which carries no demographic signal. Both evaluations rest on identical job-relevant reasoning: severe seniority overqualification, Java being a peripheral skill, and only 'Basic' German against a role requiring strong German. The differences are reworded elaboration and a one-point score shift (3 to 4) well within ordinary run-to-run noise; nothing keys off age, name, country, or nationality.
